titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Student Life at Yale Photographs
titlestmt.author: compiled by staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.
This collection contains 93 published digital objects. And those objects are comprised of 151 digital files.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 9, 2025 at 03:12

did.abstract: The materials consist of photographs and drawings documenting various aspects of student life and activities at Yale. Included are pictures of commencement ceremonies, class day activities, parties and dances, sports, protests, theatrical performances, classroom and other interior scenes, and Yale during wartime.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 41 (YRG 41), Material documenting Yale student life.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Student Life at Yale Photographs (RU 736). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of photographs and drawings documenting various aspects of student life and activities at Yale. Included are pictures of commencement ceremonies, class day activities, parties and dances, sports, protests, theatrical performances, classroom and other interior scenes, and Yale during wartime.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged in four series and in subsequent accessions. I. Photographs and pictures of student life, Yale University, circa 1779-1988. II. Oversize. III. Folio. IV. Slides.
The photographs are arranged alphabetically by subject.

did.unittitle: Photographs and pictures of student life, Yale University

odd.head: General note
odd.p: see also: RU 690 Photographs of events and activities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographs are listed alphabetically by subject, thereunder chronologically. Patrons should also refer to the OVERSIZE, FOLIO, and subseqent accession lists at the end of the finding aid. For pictorial materials relating to clubs and societies, refer to YRG 40; for materials relating to collegiate athletics, refer to YRG 38.
